visual_intent: quiet educational bridge from the March 23 feed
mist-blue calm with generous breathing room
brand_guardrails: preserve top and bottom safe zones
avoid collage layouts or sticker-heavy UI
maintain continuity with the March 23 Set 1 feed and story batch
lock all 3 story frames to the same typography personality and medium weight
do not use fake buttons or random hierarchy jumps between frames
keep text color density, opacity, and typographic presence visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: clear upper-third or middle reading zone
one short message block per frame
text-first story sequence with frame 1 hook, frame 2 bridge, and frame 3 CTA
cloud-white or mist-blue background with soft steel-blue structure and restrained apricot cues
reference_strategy: Use the March 23 Set 1 feed and story assets as the primary continuity anchor, then use editorial-whitespace and cool-palette for vertical restraint and calm story softness.
variation_guardrails: avoid copying the exact text layout or support-visual placement from March 23
keep the background treatment light and quiet
make the story feel like a next-day bridge, not a duplicate of the previous story
do not introduce strong new focal objects that compete with the message

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

slides_ja: 急に整うものではない。
まずは基礎から知ることも、その一歩です。
続きはフィードへ。やさしく見返す。

reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 24 story-only educational bridge. Keep continuity with the approved March 23 Set 1 batch while making the message lighter and more day-to-day. Typography and text density must remain locked across all 3 frames.
